zh: 新增日历详情弹窗，可查看节日与日程
新增链接打开方式设置（当前标签页 / 新标签页）
增强桌面小组件与浮动窗口
便签内容与毛玻璃渲染更稳定
改进网站图标与链接图标的回退显示
优化桌面交互、右键菜单与设置窗口拖拽性能
en: Added a calendar detail modal for holidays and events
Added a link open mode setting (current vs. new tab)
Enhanced desktop widgets and floating windows
More reliable sticky notes and glassmorphism rendering
Improved favicon and fallback link icon display
Optimized desktop interactions, context menus, and settings window drag performance

zh: CatHeadTab 首个版本：可自定义的新标签页桌面
支持壁纸（内置 / 本地 / Wallhaven）、书签与历史记录
内置时钟、天气、汇率、股票、热榜等多种小组件
集成 AI 助手，支持中英双语
en: First release of CatHeadTab: a customizable new-tab desktop
Wallpapers (built-in / local / Wallhaven), bookmarks, and history
Built-in widgets: clock, weather, exchange rates, stocks, trending, and more
AI assistant with bilingual (English / Chinese) support
